events.label: assistant
events.text: The condition is an in-service installation fault: the circulator is arranged to pump into the expansion tank connection, so the system is not pumping away from the point of no pressure change. I’m marking it failed for acceptance because that arrangement can create unstable pressures and air/cavitation problems even if the asset is still running.
